## Source: amazon-inspector (a4b0c2ab6814aa67c139dffb11add8c0013caa86df1cffd6c9e1c0de09bd395c)
The package uniswap-info was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (09a797a2e44ae2b80ae57e2b8e138c2b4fe5bb2fa5af5199d3df96537cee0a74)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'uniswap-info' @ 99999.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
